mainEntity.name: Average settlement for knee injury warehouse worker in West Jordan?
mainEntity.text: Average settlement for knee injury warehouse worker in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: $25K-$75K depending on surgery, PPI rating, wages lost.

suggestedAnswer.text: Factors: age, job, surgery (meniscus/ACL). 10-20% whole person impairment. Comps from verdicts; negotiate pre-hearing. Insurers settle 80% cases.

name: Knee Injury Settlements in Utah Warehouses
description: Utah: $25K-$75K depending on surgery, PPI rating, wages lost.
